# FOCUS v1.3 Columns

## Cost and Usage

| Column                               | Display Name                           | Category             | Type     | Introduced | Status      | Nullable | Allowed Values                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | Description                                                                                                                             |
| ------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------- | -------------------- | -------- | ---------- | ----------- | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `AllocatedMethodDetails`             | Allocated Method Details               | Allocation           | JSON     | 1.3        | Recommended | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | A set of properties describing how resources are allocated in data generator-defined split cost allocation.                             |
| `AllocatedMethodId`                  | Allocated Method ID                    | Allocation           | String   | 1.3        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The identifier of the allocation method used to split costs.                                                                            |
| `AllocatedResourceId`                | Allocated Resource ID                  | Allocation           | String   | 1.3        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The identifier of the resource the cost was allocated to.                                                                               |
| `AllocatedResourceName`              | Allocated Resource Name                | Allocation           | String   | 1.3        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The name of the resource the cost was allocated to.                                                                                     |
| `AllocatedTags`                      | Allocated Tags                         | Allocation           | JSON     | 1.3        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | A set of tags assigned to tag sources that are applicable to allocated charges in data generator-calculated split cost allocation.      |
| `AvailabilityZone`                   | Availability Zone                      | Location             | String   | 0.5        | Recommended | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The availability zone in which a resource is running or a service is provided.                                                          |
| `BilledCost`                         | Billed Cost                            | Billing              | Decimal  | 0.5        | Mandatory   | No       | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The amount charged to the buyer, net of any discounts applied, after any applicable credits.                                            |
| `BillingAccountId`                   | Billing Account ID                     | Account              | String   | 0.5        | Mandatory   | No       | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The identifier of the billing account responsible for the costs.                                                                        |
| `BillingAccountName`                 | Billing Account Name                   | Account              | String   | 0.5        | Mandatory   | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The name of the billing account responsible for the costs.                                                                              |
| `BillingAccountType`                 | Billing Account Type                   | Account              | String   | 1.2        | Conditional | No       | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The type of the billing account responsible for the costs.                                                                              |
| `BillingCurrency`                    | Billing Currency                       | Billing              | String   | 0.5        | Mandatory   | No       | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The currency used for the billing of the cost.                                                                                          |
| `BillingPeriodEnd`                   | Billing Period End                     | Timeframe            | DateTime | 0.5        | Mandatory   | No       | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The end date and time of the billing period.                                                                                            |
| `BillingPeriodStart`                 | Billing Period Start                   | Timeframe            | DateTime | 0.5        | Mandatory   | No       | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The start date and time of the billing period.                                                                                          |
| `CapacityReservationId`              | Capacity Reservation ID                | Capacity Reservation | String   | 1.1        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The identifier assigned to a capacity reservation by the provider.                                                                      |
| `CapacityReservationStatus`          | Capacity Reservation Status            | Capacity Reservation | String   | 1.1        | Conditional | Yes      | Used, Unused                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Indicates whether a charge represents consumption or the unused portion of a capacity reservation.                                      |
| `ChargeCategory`                     | Charge Category                        | Charge               | String   | 0.5        | Mandatory   | No       | Usage, Purchase, Tax, Credit, Adjustment                                                                                                                                                                                                              | The category of the charge. Allowed values: Usage, Purchase, Tax, Credit, Adjustment.                                                   |
| `ChargeClass`                        | Charge Class                           | Charge               | String   | 1.0        | Mandatory   | Yes      | Correction                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Indicates whether the row represents a correction to a previously invoiced billing period.                                              |
| `ChargeDescription`                  | Charge Description                     | Charge               | String   | 1.0        | Mandatory   | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | A description of the charge.                                                                                                            |
| `ChargeFrequency`                    | Charge Frequency                       | Charge               | String   | 1.0        | Recommended | No       | One-Time, Recurring, Usage-Based                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | The frequency of the charge. Allowed values: One-Time, Recurring, Usage-Based.                                                          |
| `ChargePeriodEnd`                    | Charge Period End                      | Timeframe            | DateTime | 0.5        | Mandatory   | No       | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The end date and time of the charge period.                                                                                             |
| `ChargePeriodStart`                  | Charge Period Start                    | Timeframe            | DateTime | 0.5        | Mandatory   | No       | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The start date and time of the charge period.                                                                                           |
| `CommitmentDiscountCategory`         | Commitment Discount Category           | Commitment Discount  | String   | 1.0        | Conditional | Yes      | Spend, Usage                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | The category of commitment discount applied. Allowed values: Spend, Usage.                                                              |
| `CommitmentDiscountId`               | Commitment Discount ID                 | Commitment Discount  | String   | 1.0        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The identifier of the commitment discount applied.                                                                                      |

| `CommitmentDiscountQuantity`         | Commitment Discount Quantity           | Commitment Discount  | Decimal  | 1.1        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The amount of a commitment discount purchased or accounted for in a given row.                                                          |
| `CommitmentDiscountStatus`           | Commitment Discount Status             | Commitment Discount  | String   | 1.0        | Conditional | Yes      | Used, Unused                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Indicates whether the charge corresponds to the used or unused portion of a commitment discount. Allowed values: Used, Unused.          |
| `CommitmentDiscountType`             | Commitment Discount Type               | Commitment Discount  | String   | 1.0        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The type of commitment discount applied.                                                                                                |
| `CommitmentDiscountUnit`             | Commitment Discount Unit               | Commitment Discount  | String   | 1.1        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The provider-specified measurement unit indicating how a provider measures the CommitmentDiscountQuantity.                              |
| `ConsumedQuantity`                   | Consumed Quantity                      | Billing              | Decimal  | 1.0        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The quantity of a resource or service consumed.                                                                                         |
| `ConsumedUnit`                       | Consumed Unit                          | Billing              | String   | 1.0        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The unit of measure for the consumed quantity.                                                                                          |
| `ContractApplied`                    | Contract Applied                       | Contract             | JSON     | 1.3        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | A set of properties that associate a charge with one or more contract commitments.                                                      |
| `ContractedCost`                     | Contracted Cost                        | Billing              | Decimal  | 1.0        | Mandatory   | No       | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The cost calculated by multiplying contracted unit price by the pricing quantity.                                                       |
| `ContractedUnitPrice`                | Contracted Unit Price                  | Billing              | Decimal  | 1.0        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The contracted unit price for the pricing unit.                                                                                         |
| `EffectiveCost`                      | Effective Cost                         | Billing              | Decimal  | 0.5        | Mandatory   | No       | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The amortized cost inclusive of the impact of commitment-based discounts.                                                               |
| `HostProviderName`                   | Host Provider Name                     | Charge Origination   | String   | 1.3        | Mandatory   | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The name of the provider hosting the resource or service.                                                                               |
| `InvoiceId`                          | Invoice ID                             | Charge Origination   | String   | 1.2        | Recommended | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The identifier of the invoice associated with the charge.                                                                               |
| `InvoiceIssuerName`                  | Invoice Issuer Name                    | Charge Origination   | String   | 0.5        | Mandatory   | No       | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The name of the entity responsible for invoicing the customer.                                                                          |
| `ListCost`                           | List Cost                              | Billing              | Decimal  | 1.0        | Mandatory   | No       | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The cost calculated by multiplying the list unit price by the pricing quantity.                                                         |
| `ListUnitPrice`                      | List Unit Price                        | Billing              | Decimal  | 1.0        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The list unit price for the pricing unit, before any discounts.                                                                         |
| `PricingCategory`                    | Pricing Category                       | Pricing              | String   | 1.0        | Conditional | Yes      | Standard, Dynamic, Committed, Other                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | The pricing model used. Allowed values: Standard, Dynamic, Committed, Other.                                                            |
| `PricingCurrency`                    | Pricing Currency                       | Pricing              | String   | 1.2        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The currency used for pricing prior to conversion to the billing currency.                                                              |
| `PricingCurrencyContractedUnitPrice` | Pricing Currency Contracted Unit Price | Pricing              | Decimal  | 1.2        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The contracted unit price expressed in the pricing currency.                                                                            |
| `PricingCurrencyEffectiveCost`       | Pricing Currency Effective Cost        | Pricing              | Decimal  | 1.2        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The effective cost expressed in the pricing currency.                                                                                   |
| `PricingCurrencyListUnitPrice`       | Pricing Currency List Unit Price       | Pricing              | Decimal  | 1.2        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The list unit price expressed in the pricing currency.                                                                                  |
| `PricingQuantity`                    | Pricing Quantity                       | Pricing              | Decimal  | 1.0        | Mandatory   | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The quantity used for pricing calculations.                                                                                             |
| `PricingUnit`                        | Pricing Unit                           | Pricing              | String   | 1.0        | Mandatory   | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Service-provider-specified measurement unit for determining unit prices.                                                                |

Deprecated in 1.3.                                  |

| `SkuPriceDetails`                    | SKU Price Details                      | SKU                  | JSON     | 1.1        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | A set of properties of a SKU Price ID which are meaningful and common to all instances of that SKU Price ID.                            |
| `SkuPriceId`                         | SKU Price ID                           | SKU                  | String   | 1.0        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The identifier for the price of a given SKU.                                                                                            |
| `SubAccountId`                       | Sub Account ID                         | Account              | String   | 0.5        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | An ID assigned to a grouping of resources or services, often used to manage access and/or cost.                                         |
| `SubAccountName`                     | Sub Account Name                       | Account              | String   | 0.5        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The name of the sub-account or project responsible for the costs.                                                                       |

| `Tags`                               | Tags                                   | Resource             | JSON     | 1.0        | Conditional | Yes      | —                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | The set of tags assigned to tag sources that account for potential provider-defined or user-defined tag evaluations.                    |

## Contract Commitment

| Column                          | Display Name                     | Category | Type     | Introduced | Status    | Nullable | Allowed Values | Description                                                            |
| ------------------------------- | -------------------------------- | -------- | -------- | ---------- | --------- | -------- | -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `BillingCurrency`               | Billing Currency                 | Contract | String   | 1.3        | Mandatory | Yes      | —              | The currency used for the billing of the contract commitment.          |
| `ContractCommitmentCategory`    | Contract Commitment Category     | Contract | String   | 1.3        | Mandatory | No       | Spend, Usage   | The category of the contract commitment. Allowed values: Spend, Usage. |
| `ContractCommitmentCost`        | Contract Commitment Cost         | Contract | Decimal  | 1.3        | Mandatory | Yes      | —              | The cost associated with the contract commitment.                      |
| `ContractCommitmentDescription` | Contract Commitment Description  | Contract | String   | 1.3        | Mandatory | Yes      | —              | A description of the contract commitment.                              |
| `ContractCommitmentId`          | Contract Commitment ID           | Contract | String   | 1.3        | Mandatory | Yes      | —              | The identifier of the contract commitment.                             |
| `ContractCommitmentPeriodEnd`   | Contract Commitment Period End   | Contract | DateTime | 1.3        | Mandatory | No       | —              | The end date and time of the contract commitment period.               |
| `ContractCommitmentPeriodStart` | Contract Commitment Period Start | Contract | DateTime | 1.3        | Mandatory | No       | —              | The start date and time of the contract commitment period.             |
| `ContractCommitmentQuantity`    | Contract Commitment Quantity     | Contract | Decimal  | 1.3        | Mandatory | Yes      | —              | The quantity associated with the contract commitment.                  |
| `ContractCommitmentType`        | Contract Commitment Type         | Contract | String   | 1.3        | Mandatory | No       | —              | The type of the contract commitment.                                   |
| `ContractCommitmentUnit`        | Contract Commitment Unit         | Contract | String   | 1.3        | Mandatory | Yes      | —              | The unit of measure for the contract commitment quantity.              |
| `ContractId`                    | Contract ID                      | Contract | String   | 1.3        | Mandatory | Yes      | —              | The identifier of the contract associated with the commitment.         |
| `ContractPeriodEnd`             | Contract Period End              | Contract | DateTime | 1.3        | Mandatory | No       | —              | The end date and time of the contract period.                          |
| `ContractPeriodStart`           | Contract Period Start            | Contract | DateTime | 1.3        | Mandatory | No       | —              | The start date and time of the contract period.                        |
